gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and recent apps sections.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh and up-to-date with the latest community creations and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee organizing a bulletin board or painting a sign that says 'README'. Represents the automated daily update of the repository's front page.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot updating a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'README'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
